goal: Add source-aware acceptance eval coverage for Sherlog source adapters

summary.title: Add source-aware acceptance eval fixtures
summary.what: Extended the synthetic acceptance gate so it creates Codex, Claude Code, and Pi fixture roots, syncs all three sources into one temporary index, and evaluates hard source-aware find/read assertions for Claude Code and Pi alongside the existing Codex cases.
summary.why: Issue #73 needs source adapter behavior to be covered by the same evidence-level acceptance gate introduced for retrieval quality, without broadening parser projection rules or depending on private dogfood data.
summary.user_goal: Add source-aware acceptance eval coverage for Sherlog source adapters

decisions.chose: Added synthetic Claude Code and Pi fixtures directly to eval/acceptance-gate.ts and synchronized them with explicit source selectors.
decisions.rationale: Synthetic public fixtures make the gate deterministic and keep private user transcript data out of the repository.

decisions.chose: Covered Claude Code message-level find plus read-range, and Pi session-level compaction find plus read-page.
decisions.rationale: Those paths exercise source-qualified session refs, source isolation, message evidence, session evidence, and both progressive read modes required by #73.

decisions.point: Compatibility of acceptance gate result shape
decisions.chose: Kept existing fixtureRoot and sync fields for Codex while adding sourceRoots and sourceSyncs for multi-source evidence.
decisions.rationale: Existing callers can continue reading the old fields, while tests and reports can inspect per-source sync summaries.

rejected.alternative: Broaden Claude Code or Pi accepted record types to improve eval recall
rejected.reason: The issue is about proving existing adapter contracts, not expanding what becomes searchable memory without a privacy design.

review_notes: Verified with npx vitest run eval/acceptance-gate.test.ts, npm run eval:acceptance, npm run check, and git diff --check -- eval/acceptance-gate.ts eval/acceptance-gate.test.ts.
This branch is stacked on the earlier acceptance-gate/query-profile work; this seal intentionally describes only commit 1c97c73 and the two eval files changed in this slice.
Archive.zip remains an unrelated untracked local file and was not included in the commit.

architectural_claims: The acceptance gate now exercises multiple public session sources through normal sync, find, and read APIs.
Source-aware eval coverage is synthetic and deterministic rather than based on private dogfood logs.
behavioral_changes: runAcceptanceGate syncs Codex, Claude Code, and Pi fixture roots before evaluating hard retrieval cases.
The hard acceptance set includes Claude Code source-qualified message recall with read-range context.
The hard acceptance set includes Pi source-qualified session-level compaction recall with read-page context.

api_changes.signature: runAcceptanceGate(): AcceptanceGateResult now includes sourceRoots and sourceSyncs alongside existing fixtureRoot and sync

security_implications: No production parser policy or persisted schema changed; new fixtures use accepted text-only records and do not index tool output or private metadata.
